test-method.name: testGetNotFoundUser
test-method.description: Kiểm tra GET user không tồn tại trả về lỗi 404 và body rỗng

exception.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected content-type "JSON" doesn't match actual content-type "text/html; charset=UTF-8".
exception.full-stacktrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected content-type "JSON" doesn't match actual content-type "text/html; charset=UTF-8".
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.java:77) at io.restassured.internal.ResponseSpecificationImpl.validate(ResponseSpecificationImpl.groovy:101) at io.restassured.internal.ValidatableResponseOptionsImpl.spec(ValidatableResponseOptionsImpl.java:288) java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:77) at test-method.name: testGetSingleUser
test-method.description: Kiểm tra GET chi tiết user id 3 với định dạng email đúng

exception.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected content-type "JSON" doesn't match actual content-type "text/html; charset=UTF-8".
